title: SAGIDE Prompt Definition
description: Schema for prompt YAML files under prompts/{domain}/{name}.yaml

name.description: Prompt identifier — must match the filename without .yaml extension.

version.description: Increment on breaking changes to prompt_template or output format.

domain.description: Must match the parent directory name (e.g. vscode, finance, research).

description.description: Human-readable description of what this prompt does.

schedule.description: Cron expression (Cronos syntax). Omit for manual-only prompts.

source_tag.description: Tag stamped on every AgentTask this prompt generates. Used by frontends to filter results.

variables.description: Default values for template variables. Each key becomes a {{key}} in prompt_template.

data_sources.description: Legacy data source descriptors (not executed at runtime; use data_collection instead).

data_collection.description: Pre-processing steps that gather external data before subtasks run. Executed by SubtaskCoordinator.

prompt_template.description: Scriban template for the main prompt body. Supports {{ variable }} substitution, loops, and conditionals.

subtasks.description: Parallel subtasks dispatched to specific models/machines. Used with data_collection for multi-model prompts.

synthesis.description: Final synthesis prompt that combines all subtask results.

outputs.description: Additional output files. Each entry may specify a source subtask result variable to write independently of the main synthesised output.

objects.description: Phase 5: Named skill instances. Expanded into data_collection steps before execution.

workflow.description: Phase 5: Ordered call sequence composing skill instances. Expanded into data_collection steps + subtasks before execution.

primary.description: Legacy single-model field. Prefer orchestrator + subtasks for multi-model prompts.

orchestrator.description: Model or machine alias used for orchestration-level calls (query planning, synthesis).

fallback.description: Model to use when primary is unavailable.

subtasks.description: Maps subtask label to model spec (e.g. 'analyst' → 'ollama/qwen2.5:14b@workstation'). Referenced in prompts via {{model_preference.subtasks.label}}.

name.description: Unique step name within this data_collection block.

type.description: Step type determines which collector runs. 'skill' expands a named skill. 'llm' submits a single free-form LLM call and stores the result. 'vector_search' queries the RAG vector store by source_tag. 'json_extract' parses a JSON variable and promotes its fields into the var context. 'web_fetch' fetches a URL and extracts readable text from HTML (use for deterministic URLs where search is unnecessary).

skill.description: Reference to a named skill in the skills/ library. Format: 'domain/name' or just 'name'. When set, type may be omitted.

parameters.description: Constructor arguments passed to the skill. Merged over the skill's default parameters. Supports {{ template }} expressions.

output_var.description: Variable name to store this step's output. Referenced by subtask input_vars and synthesis templates.

optional_output.description: When true, an empty output_var does not abort the run. Use for search tracks where zero results is a legitimate outcome. A missing_data_summary var is injected into context so downstream prompts can acknowledge unavailable data.

fetch_pages.description: Number of top search result pages to fetch and extract text from. 0 (default) = snippet-only. When > 0, actual page content is fetched, HTML-stripped, and appended. Typically 1-2.

max_chars_per_page.description: Maximum characters of extracted text per fetched page. Default 3000.

source.description: URL or file path. Supports {{ template }} expressions. Used by read_file, web_api, web_api_batch.

query.description: Search query template. Used by web_search_batch.

iterate_over.description: Template expression that resolves to a collection to iterate over (e.g. '{{watchlist.symbols}}'). Used by web_api_batch.

input.description: Input variable reference. Used by filter steps.

condition.description: Filter condition expression (e.g. 'pct_change <= -5'). Used by filter steps.

limit.description: Maximum number of items to include (integer or template string).

planning_prompt.description: Scriban prompt sent to the LLM for llm_queries steps. The LLM must return a JSON string array of search queries.

model.description: Model spec for the LLM call in llm_queries / llm_per_section steps. Supports {{ template }} expressions.

section_analysis_prompt.description: Per-section analysis prompt for llm_per_section steps. Available vars: {{section_name}}, {{search_results}}.

search_results_var.description: Name of the var holding search results for llm_per_section. Defaults to 'all_search_results'.

max_sections.description: Maximum sections to generate for llm_per_section (integer or template string). Default 5.

section_title.description: When set with max_sections: '1', the planning LLM call is skipped and this value is used as the single section name. Saves a full LLM round-trip for single-section skills.

prompt_template.description: Scriban prompt for type: llm steps. The rendered text is submitted as a single LLM task; the result is stored in output_var.

input_vars.description: Optional list of var names to include in context for type: llm steps. When empty, all current vars are available.

name.description: Unique subtask identifier within this prompt. Also determines the synthesis variable name: {name}_result.

input_vars.description: Names of data_collection output_vars to include in this subtask's context. If empty, all collected vars are passed.

depends_on.description: Names of other subtasks that must complete before this one is dispatched. Their results are available as {{name_result}} in the prompt template.

prompt_template.description: Scriban template for this subtask's prompt body.
Scriban template for the final synthesis prompt. Subtask outputs are available as {{subtask_name_result}}.

format.description: Output format hint (e.g. markdown, json, json+markdown).

destination.description: File path to write the final output. Supports {{date}} template.

notify.description: Whether to emit a notification after writing output.

source.description: For use in the outputs list only. Names a subtask result variable to write (e.g. evaluator_result). When omitted, the synthesised output is written.

PromptObject.description: Phase 5: A named skill instance in a workflow's objects: section.

name.description: Local instance name used in the workflow sequence (e.g. 'market', 'analyst').

optional.description: When true, an empty output from this object's collect/search step does not abort the run. Use for search tracks where zero results is a legitimate outcome (e.g. novel product ideas with no comparable companies). A missing_data_summary var is injected into context.

args.description: Constructor arguments overriding the skill's default parameters.

WorkflowCall.description: Phase 5: A single step in the workflow: call sequence.

parallel.description: List of method calls to execute in parallel.

args.description: Runtime arguments merged over the object's args for this call.
